svg.text: • 32. Longest Valid Parentheses — stack of indices, track last invalid
• 921 / 1249. Minimum Add / Remove to Make Parentheses Valid
• 394. Decode String — push (multiplier, prefix) on '[', pop on ']'
• 71. Simplify Path — push directories, pop on '..'
• 155. Min Stack — pair every push with running min
• 232. Implement Queue using Stacks — amortised O(1) per op
• 150. Evaluate Reverse Polish Notation — pure stack evaluator
• 224 / 227 / 772. Basic Calculator I/II/III — values + operators stacks
• 173. Binary Search Tree Iterator — controlled-DFS via stack
Whenever "current state depends on most recent unfinished thing", reach for a stack.
